data.title: Amazon And USPS Strike Deal On Package Handling, Averting Major Cutback: Report
data.description: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) has reached a tentative agreement with the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) regarding package handling to avoid a significant decrease in package volume. The deal entails a 20% reduction in the number of packages Amazon will send through USPS, a notable shift from Amazon's initial threat to cut package volume by two-thirds. The agreement is now under review by the Postal Regulatory Commission. In the previous year, USPS managed over 1 billion Amazon packages, indicating the key role the Amazon-USPS partnership plays in parcel flow. Responses from Amazon.com and USPS are pending.

data.title: MEXC Lists Two Ondo Tokenized Stock Trading Pairs Tied to Quantum Computing Sector
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles on April 7, 2026, MEXC, a prominent platform for fee-free digital asset trading, announced the listing of two Ondo tokenized stock trading pairs on its spot market. These pairs are connected to top quantum computing companies. This decision enhances the variety of real-world assets (RWA) available on the platform, contributing to its position as a global leader in the industry.

data.title: KIA K4 HATCHBACK NAMED "2026 PEOPLE'S VEHICLE OF TEXAS (BEST VALUE)" BY THE TEXAS AUTO WRITERS' ASSOCIATION
data.description: In Irvine, California on April 7, 2026, the 2026 K4 GT Line Turbo Hatchback by Kia made headlines as it won the coveted "People's Vehicle of Texas (Best Value)" award at the 2026 Texas Auto Writers' Association (TAWA) Auto Roundup. This award highlighted the vehicle's exceptional value proposition in the Texas market. The recognition came amidst stiff competition, emphasizing that despite its smaller size, the K4 GT Line Turbo Hatchback stood out among the crowd. It was a significant achievement for Kia, showcasing their ability to deliver quality vehicles tailored to the preferences of consumers.

data.title: Nuvalent Announces Submission of New Drug Application to FDA for Neladalkib in TKI Pre-treated Advanced ALK-positive NSCLC
data.description: Nuvalent, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, submitted a New Drug Application (NDA) on April 7, 2026, based on data from TKI pre-treated patients in the ALKOVE-1 Phase 1/2 global clinical trial. The company, listed on Nasdaq as NUVL, specializes in developing targeted therapies.

data.title: Nextdoor Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: Nextdoor has revealed that it will announce its financial results for the First Quarter of 2026 on a date to be determined. Additionally, the company will conduct a conference call to discuss these results. Further details regarding the specific date and time of the announcement and call will be disclosed shortly.

data.title: Neogen Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Neogen Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on April 9th before the market opens. Analysts are predicting a decrease in earnings per share to 5 cents, down from 10 cents in the same quarter last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $204.62 million, a decline from $220.98 million in the previous year. Neogen recently sold its Genomics business to Zoetis and its shares closed at $9.56 on Monday, up 1.6%. For more information and the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.description: The company Sasol Financing USA LLC (NYSE: SSL) provided a financial update on April 7, 2026, in Johannesburg. The information is restricted from being released, published, or distributed in certain jurisdictions due to legal reasons. The company's stock symbol is SSL.
